overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, walking through Night City at night. The camera moves from a dark area under an elevated highway through covered walkways and neon-lit commercial streets, ending near a busy intersection with passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the dark highway overpass, approaching a distant light

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning overhead
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overpass
construction barriers with alternating yellow and black stripes
illuminated signage for a noodle shop under the overpass
tall street lamp with glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed space beneath a massive highway overpass. Concrete pillars line the left side while yellow construction barriers sit on the right. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk toward a distant light, with minimal pedestrian activity and artificial lighting from street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital billboards

events.description: exits dark overpass into brighter covered walkway with visible sky and digital billboards ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway following a pedestrian in a white jacket and orange pants

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and orange pants walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: metal walkway structure connecting buildings overhead
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on building facade
tall modern building with reflective glass windows
brutalist concrete structure with small windows

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark overpass into a covered commercial walkway. Digital billboards become visible on the left building facades while a pedestrian in distinctive orange pants walks ahead. The space remains sheltered but brighter, with mixed lighting from street lamps and building illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with storefronts and holographic ads

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant neon glow from storefronts and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following the pedestrian in orange pants past various storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and bright orange pants walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: floating holographic advertisement displaying animated characters
bright green neon sign reading OPEN on storefront
illuminated shop windows with merchandise visible
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant commercial street dominated by neon lighting. Holographic billboards float above on the left while a bright green OPEN sign illuminates a storefront on the right. The camera continues following the pedestrian in orange pants through this exposed urban corridor with tall glass towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with active vehicle traffic

events.description: vehicles begin passing by on the street as camera approaches intersection
camera moves from sidewalk toward street level, approaching moving traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the street crossing, moving toward the intersection with passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street
black sedan following the red car through the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic cars with glowing taillights driving on the street
wide urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks
painted white stripes marking pedestrian crossing area
construction barriers blocking part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy urban intersection. The camera moves from the sidewalk toward the street where futuristic vehicles drive past. Crosswalk markings appear on the asphalt as the scene opens up to a wider space with active traffic, transitioning from the enclosed commercial street to the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, oppressive underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city. It begins in an enclosed space beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past concrete pillars and yellow construction barriers toward a distant light. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a sheltered commercial walkway where digital billboards appear on the facades and a pedestrian in orange pants leads the way. The scene then shifts into a vibrant urban corridor dominated by floating holographic advertisements and a bright green neon sign, with tall glass towers looming in the distance. Finally, the camera moves from the sidewalk toward a busy intersection, where the enclosed street gives way to an open expanse of asphalt and passing futuristic vehicles.
